title: Roasted Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful Malaysian-inspired curry made with roasted chicken and intense spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the chicken with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until coated.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the intensely roasted curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the Malaysian curry sauce and stir to combine.
Add the roasted chicken, tomatoes, and coconut milk to the skillet.
Simmer for 10-15 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
